title: cannotCalculateChanges is correct; returning all-IDs-as-created was a protocol lie
description: contact_changes and contact_query_changes previously returned all current IDs as 'created' when state differed. That violates RFC 8620 §5.2 — the response implied the daemon had a change log it does not have. The fix returns cannotCalculateChanges, forcing clients to fall back to a full refresh via ChatContact/get with ids=null. A contributor might suggest restoring the 'return all IDs' behavior as simpler; this would be wrong because it misrepresents whether the daemon can calculate changes and breaks client cache invalidation logic that relies on the distinction.
